title: blasphemeo #0987
definition:
1) to speak reproachfully, rail at, revile, calumniate, blaspheme
 2) to be evil spoken of, reviled, railed at
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to speak reproachfully, rail at, revile, calumniate, blaspheme
 2) to be evil spoken of, reviled, railed at

    NASB:  to slander, hence to speak lightly or profanely of sacred things:
